# Placeholder Audio Cues

These cue files are temporary WAV beep placeholders so the app has audio assets at the paths it expects.

Replace these files with the final cue recordings when they are ready:

- `warmup_start.wav`
- `work_start.wav`
- `rest_start.wav`
- `warning_10.wav`
- `cooldown_start.wav`
- `workout_complete.wav`
